notes: Executed by the conformance parity runner against the local staged-mutation path with live fixture variables. Shopify returns newly created image media as `UPLOADED` with null `preview.image` / `MediaImage.image` urls in the mutation payload, while the immediate downstream read can already shift the asset into a null-url `PROCESSING` state before it later becomes `READY`.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a stable local MediaImage GID for the staged session; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The mutation payload product media connection reuses the staged local MediaImage GID generated by productCreateMedia.
The downstream proxy read uses the staged local MediaImage GID generated by productCreateMedia.
